sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111788" key="flogerw=nuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλογ-ερῶνυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠχος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄνυξ</etym>) <sense id="n111788.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with fiery hoofs,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2578.tlg001:2:187" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jo.Gaz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ecphr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.187</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
